description: A major IT hardware supplier ('Apex IT Solutions') has unexpectedly filed for Chapter 7 bankruptcy and is liquidating. As the IT Procurement Manager, decommission the supplier and mitigate risk on associated assets. Update the 'Apex IT Solutions' supplier record to the name 'Apex IT Solutions (BANKRUPT)', clear its contact email and phone number, and add the note 'DO NOT USE - Chapter 7 Bankruptcy'. For all hardware assets purchased from 'Apex IT Solutions', set the warranty duration to 0 months and append '[WARRANTY VOID - SUPPLIER BANKRUPT]' to their notes. Do not modify assets from other suppliers or delete any records.
